title: viola martii subsp. odorata
intro: Viola martii subsp. odorata, also known as the fragrant purple violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola martii subsp. odorata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its use in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made from its leaves, flowers, and roots.
